dj_text: That was Unknown. Next up, something completely different — just kidding, it's C.R.E.A.M | Medieval Bardcore Version | Wu-Tang Clan | Cash Rules Everything Around Me.
commercial_text: Hey, tough times? Feeling broke and stranded like a pirate at sea with no treasure map to guide 'em!
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: C.R.E.A.M | Medieval Bardcore Version | Wu-Tang Clan | Cash Rules Everything Around Me
